---
title: "Miguel R."
image: "assets/profile.jpg"
about:
  template: trestles # This creates a clean two-column layout (Image/Links on left, Text on right)
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/rmigue
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/migue-rc
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:miguel@debloat.us
---

I am a software engineer with a deep focus on data science, bridging the gap between complex predictive modeling and scalable, user-facing applications. With a strong foundation in React, React Native, and versatile backend development, I don't just analyze data; I build the systems that put those insights directly into the hands of users.

I have extensive experience architecting data-heavy applications, ensuring that large volumes of information are processed efficiently and displayed intuitively. I particularly thrive when working with geospatial data translating complex datasets into interactive, highly responsive maps that bring geographic insights to life and drive user engagement.

My passion for clean, reusable code drives me to deliver innovative solutions, whether I am engineering zero latency frontend deployments for machine learning models or optimizing system performance.

## Education

**Pontificia Universidad Católica** 
M.S. in Data Science | `In Progress`    

**Academia de Guerra** B.S. in Military Sciences 

## Core Competencies

* **Data Science & Modeling:** Predictive Analytics, StatsModels, Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow.js, Geospatial Analysis, Quarto, Python.
* **Software Engineering:** Full-stack Web Development, Mobile App Development React/React Native, TypeScript, Bash.
* **Systems & Tools:** Linux, Google Cloud Platform, Amazon Web Services, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Firebase.
